ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the league */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points by the team */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the team */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the team */,
  "face_off_wins" INTEGER /* Total face-off wins by the team */,
  "average_time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal by the team */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "stolen_pucks" INTEGER /* Total stolen pucks by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves by the team */,
  "goals_against_average" REAL /* Average goals against per game */,
  "save_percentage" REAL /* Save percentage of the team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the team */,
  "expected_score" TEXT /* Expected score of the team */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points of the team */,
  "games_played_1" INTEGER /* Games played in the previous season */,
  "goals_for_1" INTEGER /* Goals scored in the previous season */,
  "assists_1" INTEGER /* Assists in the previous season */,
  "points_1" INTEGER /* Points in the previous season */,
  "plus_minus_1" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating in the previous season */,
  "penalty_minutes_1" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes in the previous season */,
  "face_off_wins_1" INTEGER /* Face-off wins in the previous season */,
  "average_time_on_ice_1" TEXT /* Average time on ice in the previous season */,
  "shots_on_goal_1" INTEGER /* Shots on goal in the previous season */,
  "hits_1" INTEGER /* Hits in the previous season */,
  "blocks_1" INTEGER /* Blocks in the previous season */,
  "stolen_pucks_1" INTEGER /* Stolen pucks in the previous season */,
  "wins_1" INTEGER /* Wins in the previous season */,
  "saves_1" INTEGER /* Saves in the previous season */,
  "goals_against_average_1" REAL /* Goals against per game in the previous season */,
  "save_percentage_1" REAL /* Save percentage in the previous season */,
  "sum" REAL /* Sum of all performance metrics */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defense, Goalie) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the player */,
  "face_off_wins" INTEGER /* Total face-off wins by the player */,
  "average_time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "stolen_pucks" INTEGER /* Total stolen pucks by the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points by the team in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the team in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the team in the game */,
  "face_off_wins" INTEGER /* Total face-off wins by the team in the game */,
  "average_time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal by the team in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the team in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team in the game */,
  "stolen_pucks" INTEGER /* Total stolen pucks by the team in the game */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Wins by the team in the game */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves by the team in the game */,
  "goals_against_average" REAL /* Average goals against per game */,
  "save_percentage" REAL /* Save percentage of the team in the game */,
  "power_play_percentage" REAL /* Power play percentage of the team in the game */,
  "penalty_kill_percentage" REAL /* Penalty kill percentage of the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes of the player in the game */,
  "face_off_wins" INTEGER /* Total face-off wins by the player in the game */,
  "average_time_on_ice" TEXT /* Average time on ice per game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal by the player in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in the game */,
  "stolen_pucks" INTEGER /* Total stolen pucks by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
